questionHtml:
An object is travelling with velocity 5 m s−1. The object then accelerates to 15 m s−1 in the same direction.

What is the variation with time of the acceleration of the object?

meta.title: An object is travelling with velocity 5 m s−1. The object then accelerates to 15 m s−1 in the same direction. What is the variation with time of the acceleration of the object?
